name: player_espn_line_win_rate
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2026]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years) select "player"."pid", "t6abead8770b52c2269bd1859cdf99b10"."win_rate" AS "espn_line_win_rate_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "espn_player_win_rates_index" as "t6abead8770b52c2269bd1859cdf99b10" on "t6abead8770b52c2269bd1859cdf99b10"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t6abead8770b52c2269bd1859cdf99b10"."season_year" = 2025 and "t6abead8770b52c2269bd1859cdf99b10"."espn_win_rate_type" = 'PASS_BLOCK' group by "t6abead8770b52c2269bd1859cdf99b10"."win_rate", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
